goal: 刷新 external submission packet 到 PR #13 合入后的主线状态

summary.title: 刷新 external submission packet 到 PR #13 合入后的主线状态
summary.what: 更新 release cutover decision packet 和 external submission packet，记录 PR #13 合入后的 origin/main@a0d7781530ed6547fc77a4a52066d0bc39d36292、重新生成的 external submission artifact、机器可读 handoff manifest，以及最新 origin/main pre-submission gate 结果。
summary.why: 当前主线已经进入 cutover delivery，下一步是外部 store/deployment submission 或一个真实 profile UAT。PR #13 新增 manifest 命令后，交付包需要指向当前 accepted main 和已生成的 manifest，避免后续 agent 或发布人沿用 PR #10 的旧提交状态。
summary.user_goal: 刷新 external submission packet 到 PR #13 合入后的主线状态

decisions.chose: 刷新 release packet 的当前 artifact/manifest 证据，不新增 backlog 或 deferred product scope
decisions.rationale: live queue 为空且 origin/main cutover gate 绿，真实剩余边界是外部提交/单次 UAT，而不是继续拆小票。

decisions.chose: 从当前 origin/main head 重新运行 package 与 submission manifest 命令，并在文档中记录 manifest path、source commit、source PR、SHA256 与 ready_for_upload 状态
decisions.rationale: 外部提交需要证明上传物和 handoff manifest 对应当前主线，而不是旧 PR 的近似状态。

rejected.alternative: 只保留 PR #10 的 artifact 记录
rejected.reason: PR #13 已改变 release handoff 流程；继续只记录旧 source commit 会让发布包与当前主线状态失真。

rejected.alternative: 把 queue 为空解释成继续规划 deferred breadth
rejected.reason: 当前 gate 绿且文档明确剩余边界是外部 submission / 单个 UAT。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun run release:acceptance 返回 ok true，包含 extension build、real Chromium MV3 smoke、repo-wide check；repo-wide check 覆盖 38 files / 621 tests。
origin/main pre-submission gate 在 codex/verify-origin-main tracking origin/main 上通过：bun run release:cutover:status ok true，blockers 为空。
feature branch 上 release:cutover:status 会因无 upstream/dirty 状态失败；该失败不是产品 gate 失败，packet 仍要求在 codex/verify-origin-main/origin/main 上执行最终 gate。

architectural_claims: cutover delivery remains the active lane while the gate stays green
external submission handoff now records the PR #13 manifest command state and current accepted main commit
behavioral_changes: documentation now points external submission to origin/main@a0d7781530ed6547fc77a4a52066d0bc39d36292 and the generated handoff manifest
security_implications: No runtime or permission changes; docs only.
migration_notes: No migration required; old repository remains maintenance/reference mode.
